member.name: T:Items.API.Controllers.ItemClassesController
member.summary: Behavioral templates inherited by items.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.ItemClassesController.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a paginated list of active item classes.
member.returns: Paged list of item class summaries ordered by code.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.ItemClassesController.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a single item class by ID.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.ItemClassesController.Create(Items.Application.ItemClasses.Dtos.CreateItemClassRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new item class.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.ItemClassesController.Update(System.Int32,Items.Application.ItemClasses.Dtos.UpdateItemClassRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing item class (ItemNature is non-editable post-create).
member.param: The item class ID to update.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.ItemClassesController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Soft-deletes an item class.
member.param: The item class ID to delete.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.ItemClassesController.Clone(System.Int32,Items.Application.ItemClasses.Dtos.CloneItemClassRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Clones an item class with a new code and name.
member.param: The new code and name for the clone.
member.returns: The newly created item class clone.

member.name: T:Items.API.Controllers.ItemsController
member.summary: Item master with sub-entities (alternate UOMs, specs, drawings, warehouse thresholds).

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.ItemsController.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{Items.Domain.Enums.ItemType},System.Nullable{Items.Domain.Enums.ItemNature},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a paginated list of items; filterable by class, type, and nature.
member.param: Filter by item type enum value.
Filter by item nature (Goods or Service).

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.ItemsController.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a full item record including all sub-entities.
member.returns: The full item with alternate UOMs, specs, drawings, and warehouse thresholds.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.ItemsController.Create(Items.Application.Items.Dtos.CreateItemRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new item with all sub-entities.
member.param: The item to create including alternate UOMs, specs, drawings, and thresholds.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.ItemsController.Update(System.Int32,Items.Application.Items.Dtos.UpdateItemRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an item (ItemNature and dimension flags are non-editable post-create).
member.param: The updated item values. Sub-entity collections are fully replaced.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.ItemsController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Soft-deletes an item (blocked if transaction history exists).

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.ItemsController.Clone(System.Int32,Items.Application.Items.Dtos.CloneItemRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deep-clones an item including all sub-entities.
member.param: The new name and SKU for the clone.

member.name: T:Items.API.Controllers.ItemSettingsController
member.summary: Global configuration singleton for the item module.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.ItemSettingsController.Get(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the singleton item settings record (defaults if never saved).

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.ItemSettingsController.Upsert(Items.Application.ItemSettings.Dtos.UpdateItemSettingsRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates or updates the singleton item settings.

member.name: T:Items.API.Controllers.ItemVendorMappingsController
member.summary: Vendor-item purchase relationships including UOM grid and pricing slabs.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.ItemVendorMappingsController.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a paginated list of vendor mappings; filterable by itemId and vendorId.
member.returns: Paged list of vendor mapping summaries.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.ItemVendorMappingsController.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a full vendor mapping with purchase UOM grid and pricing slabs.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.ItemVendorMappingsController.Create(Items.Application.ItemVendorMappings.Dtos.CreateItemVendorMappingRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a vendor-item mapping with purchase UOM grid and pricing.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.ItemVendorMappingsController.Update(System.Int32,Items.Application.ItemVendorMappings.Dtos.UpdateItemVendorMappingRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates a vendor mapping (ItemId and VendorId are non-editable post-create).
member.param: The vendor mapping ID to update.
The updated values. UOM grid and pricing collections are fully replaced.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.ItemVendorMappingsController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Soft-deletes a vendor mapping (blocked if referenced in an active PO).
member.param: The vendor mapping ID to delete.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.ItemVendorMappingsController.Clone(System.Int32,Items.Application.ItemVendorMappings.Dtos.CloneItemVendorMappingRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Clones a vendor mapping, optionally targeting a different item or vendor.
member.param: Optional override for target item or vendor; clone is never preferred by default.
member.returns: The newly created vendor mapping clone.

member.name: T:Items.API.Controllers.PriceListsController
member.summary: Sales and purchase price list headers with pricing slabs.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.PriceListsController.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a paginated list of price lists ordered by priority (highest first).
member.returns: Paged list of price list summaries.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.PriceListsController.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a price list with all pricing slabs.
member.returns: The price list with line items sorted by MinQty.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.PriceListsController.Create(Items.Application.PriceLists.Dtos.CreatePriceListRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a price list with pricing slabs.
member.param: The price list to create including line items.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.PriceListsController.Update(System.Int32,Items.Application.PriceLists.Dtos.UpdatePriceListRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates a price list (ApplicableTo is non-editable post-create).
member.param: The price list ID to update.
The updated values. Line items collection is fully replaced.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.PriceListsController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Soft-deletes a price list (blocked if linked to an active SO or contract).
member.param: The price list ID to delete.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.PriceListsController.Clone(System.Int32,Items.Application.PriceLists.Dtos.ClonePriceListRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Clones a price list as Draft with a new name.
member.param: The new name for the clone.
member.returns: The newly created price list clone in Draft status.

member.name: T:Items.API.Controllers.UomsController
member.summary: Unit of measure lookup master.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.UomsController.GetAll(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all active UOMs.
member.returns: List of active UOMs ordered by code.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.UomsController.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a single UOM by ID.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.UomsController.Create(Items.Application.Uoms.Dtos.CreateUomRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new UOM.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.UomsController.Update(System.Int32,Items.Application.Uoms.Dtos.UpdateUomRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing UOM.

member.name: M:Items.API.Controllers.UomsController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Soft-deletes a UOM (blocked if used on any item).

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
